locations.name: 康乃爾鳥類學實驗室
locations.summary: 康乃爾大學鳥類學實驗室位於纽约州伊萨卡，是康乃爾大學研究鳥類學和其他野生生物的成員支援單位。位在薩普薩克森林保護區（Sapsucker Woods Sanctuary）伊莫金約翰遜鳥類和生物多樣性研究院中心（Imogene Powers…

relations.subject: Southern martin
relations.evidence: Downloaded from https://datazone.birdlife.org/species/factsheet/southern-martin-progne-elegans on January 23, 2026 The Cornell Lab of Ornithology's Birds of the World states that it breeds in southern Bolivia and Argentina and spends the austral winter in Brazil, Colombia, and Peru "but possibly also as far [north] as [eastern] Panama"

relations.subject: Southern martin
relations.evidence: It further notes that some may overwinter in Argentina, that it has been recorded in Uruguay, and that it is accidental in the Malvinas/Falklands and Florida. The American Ornithological Society states that the species breeds in Argentina, Bolivia, Paraguay, and Uruguay and winters in Brazil, Colombia, and Peru

relations.subject: Southern martin
relations.evidence: | pages =456 }} The southern martin inhabits a variety of semi-open to open landscapes including grasslands, woodlands, scrublands, and areas of human habitation. As is the case with the species' range, its upper elevation limit differs among sources
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
